candidates.prompt:
参照画像のテイストをそのままに、設定したテーマでNano Banana Proに1週間のコーディネートを考えてもらう。

DeepResearchと組み合わせてリアルの自分のコーディネートを作ってもらうのも面白そうですよ。プロンプト：
# 設定項目（ここを変更してください）
設定：
[キャラクターの特徴]: 黒髪ロングヘアの女子高生
[ファッションのテーマ]: 現代女子高生の普段着、清楚系

変換のルール:
- [キャラクターの特徴] の同一人物が、横一列に7人並んでいるファッションルックブックの画像。
- [ファッションのテーマ] に基づいた、それぞれ異なる7種類の新しい私服コーディネートのみを着用している。
- 参照画像の [画風・スタイル] を完全に維持している。
- [参照画像の衣装] は着用せず、[ファッションのテーマ] に基づいた、それぞれ異なる7種類のコーディネートを着ている。
- 全身ショット。
- 背景は真っ白、もしくはわずかにアイボリー。
- 足元には自然な影が落ちている。画像のレイアウトは雑誌の切り抜きのよう。
- 各人物の下には左から順に「Monday」「Tuesday」「Wednesday」「Thursday」「Friday」「Saturday」「Sunday」という文字が書かれている。
- 上部にはスタイリッシュなタイトルテキスト。

アートスタイル:
- 高解像
- スタジオライティング
- 4k
- --ar 16:9

candidates.prompt: Using the uploaded photo as the sole character reference, generate a vertical outfit poster.  【LAYOUT HARD RULES】 - Must have exactly 6 cards only, 2 rows × 3 columns (3 columns across, 2 rows down) - Row 1: LOOK 1, 2, 3 | Row 2: LOOK 4, 5, 6 - Prohibited: 9-grid, 3 rows × 2 columns, 2-column layout, extra cards, top header/title  【CANVAS & LAYOUT】 - Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, background #F7F5F2 - Grid occupies ≥92% of canvas height, bottom margin ≤3% - Outer margin 2%, spacing 1.5%, strictly aligned  【CARD SPECIFICATIONS】 - White background #FFFFFF, border-radius 5%, stroke 1px #E5E7EB - Top title bar: height 12%, background #F3F4F6, text color #111827 - Sans-serif font, alignment consistent throughout  【3D ENVIRONMENT PHILOSOPHY】 - Real photographic person standing inside 3D rendered environment - Design principle: "Less is More" — every element serves a purpose - Elegant simplicity with refined details, not empty or cold - Scene tells a story that matches the outfit's occasion - Color palette of scene harmonizes with outfit tones  【3D SCENE VISUAL LANGUAGE】 - Architectural style: contemporary minimalist with warm touches - Key materials: Venetian plaster, white oak, brushed brass, natural stone, soft bouclé fabric - Lighting: golden hour warmth, soft window light, subtle volumetric glow - Decorative restraint: 2-3 curated props maximum per scene - Atmospheric depth: gentle light rays, soft shadows, subtle reflections  【LOOK 1 — BUSINESS/CLASSIC】 Scene: Executive corner office at sunrise - Floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer curtains, soft morning light streaming in - Cream marble floor with subtle veining, single designer leather chair - Floating walnut credenza with one orchid in ceramic vase - Brass floor lamp casting warm accent glow - Palette: warm ivory, caramel, soft gold accents - Mood: confident, polished, quietly powerful  【LOOK 2 — CASUAL/WEEKEND】 Scene: Sunlit modern apartment living room - Large arched window with linen curtains, dappled afternoon light - Light oak herringbone floor, cream bouclé sofa edge visible - Potted olive tree in terracotta planter, stack of coffee table books - Soft throw blanket draped casually, single dried pampas arrangement - Palette: warm white, sage green, natural wood, terracotta - Mood: relaxed, effortless, Sunday morning comfort  【LOOK 3 — SMART CASUAL/EVENING】 Scene: Intimate wine bar or upscale lounge - Curved plaster archway with ambient alcove lighting - Terrazzo bar counter edge, two vintage cognac glasses - Velvet barstool, single candle in amber glass holder - Exposed brick accent wall (painted soft white), brass wall sconce - Palette: warm blush, burgundy accents, soft amber, cream - Mood: sophisticated, date night ready, understated glamour  【LOOK 4 — RESORT/VACATION】 Scene: Mediterranean villa terrace at golden hour - Whitewashed curved walls, bougainvillea trailing overhead - Terracotta tile floor, rattan lounger with linen cushion - Infinity edge with turquoise sea glimpse, distant horizon - Citrus tree in aged ceramic pot, straw hat on side table - Palette: crisp white, ocean blue, terracotta, sun-bleached naturals - Mood: dreamy escape, coastal elegance, la dolce vita  【LOOK 5 — ATHLEISURE/ACTIVE】 Scene: Luxury wellness studio at dawn - Floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking misty cityscape - Polished concrete floor, single yoga mat rolled at edge - Potted snake plant, minimalist water bottle on wooden bench - Soft diffused morning light, subtle fog outside windows - Palette: soft gray, white, black accents, touches of eucalyptus green - Mood: energized calm, mindful movement, elevated everyday  【LOOK 6 — LAYERED/TRANSITIONAL】 Scene: Cozy reading nook on autumn afternoon - Built-in bookshelf with curated neutral-spine books - Window seat with chunky knit throw, velvet cushions - Warm side lamp glow, single cup of steaming tea - Rain-kissed window with soft bokeh of golden leaves outside - Palette: camel, rust, cream, warm brown, amber lighting - Mood: hygge warmth, thoughtful layers, poetic comfort  【CHARACTER-SCENE INTEGRATION】 - Photorealistic character with natural skin, real fabric textures - Character positioned naturally within scene context (not just standing) - Subtle interaction: hand near furniture, natural stance on floor - Contact shadow + soft ambient occlusion anchoring to 3D ground - Scene lighting wraps character correctly (direction, warmth, intensity match) - 3D environment slightly soft/shallow DOF, character in sharp focus - Prohibited: floating, pasted-on look, lighting mismatch, wrong scale  【CHARACTER CONSISTENCY】 - All 6 must be the same person in different outfits - Same face, same hairstyle, same body proportions, same demeanor - Expression subtle and natural, matches scene mood - Prohibited: switching people/changing face/altering gender features/extreme slimming  【CHARACTER PHOTOGRAPHY QUALITY】 - Master-level full-body photography, 85mm portrait lens - Natural skin texture, visible fabric weave, real hair strands - Soft key light + scene-matched fill light - Real human appearance — NOT 3D rendered, NOT CGI avatar  【UNIFORM CROPPING】 - 4:5 full-body, complete from head to shoes - Subject centered, height 88%±2% - Headroom 2-4%, footroom 3-5%, shoes fully visible on 3D ground - All six shots: consistent camera height/focal length/character scale  【OUTFIT RULES】 - Auto-adapt based on subject age (adult/child) - Each look ≤3 core items, max 3 colors per outfit, accessories ≤2 - Outfit colors intentionally harmonize with assigned scene palette - 6 looks distinctly different, cohesive editorial collection feel  【TITLE SETS】 Adult: Business/Classic → Casual/Weekend → Smart Casual/Evening → Resort/Vacation → Athleisure/Active → Layered/Transitional Kids: Everyday/Clean → School/Polished → Weekend/Play → Party/Sweet → Active/Sporty → Layered/Cozy  【RENDERING QUALITY】 - Photorealistic 3D environment, Octane/Redshift render quality - Global illumination, soft ray-traced shadows - Subtle film grain (1-2%), gentle lens vignette - Color grading: warm highlights, neutral midtones, lifted shadows  NEGATIVE: 3x3, nine-grid, 9 cards, extra cards, 3 rows x 2 columns, two-column layout, big top header, page title, switching people, changing face, multiple people, lowres, blurry, plastic skin, wide-angle distortion, fisheye, warped body, extreme slimming, long legs effect, plain white background, seamless paper backdrop, flat studio backdrop, empty scene, cold sterile environment, cluttered props, busy background, maximalist decor, cut off shoes, half body, 3D rendered human, CGI character, digital avatar, cartoon person, floating character, no ground shadow, mismatched lighting, pasted-on look, wrong perspective, scale mismatch, adultification, sexy, lingerie, see-through, high heels (kids), heavy makeup (kids), watermark, cropped text, oversaturated, HDR overprocessed

Her head is tilted downward, suggesting a moment of deep introspection, concentration, or being lost in the feeling of the dance. Her pose is one of graceful control amidst the swirling chaos of fabric around her.Facial Features and Makeup: Her makeup is immaculate and dramatic, perfectly complementing the intensity of the scene.Eyes: Her eyelids are adorned with a blended, smoky eyeshadow in shades of rich crimson and dark shadow, creating a powerful, artistic look. Tucked into her hair, just above her ear, is a single, vibrant red flower with multiple layers of petals, resembling a dahlia. It can be broken down into two main components: the core dress and the dynamic, flowing fabric elements.The Core Bodice:Structure and Fit: The visible part of the dress is a form-fitting, sleeveless bodice in a deep, saturated scarlet red. candidates.title: 3D雷射內雕水晶
candidates.prompt: # Role Definition:You are an expert product photographer and creative art director specializing in high-end luxury goods. Your sole task is to generate a photorealistic image of a custom 3D subsurface laser-engraved crystal ornament based on a simple subject provided by the user.# Core Directive:The user will provide only the [Subject]. You must autonomously analyze this subject to determine the most aesthetically appropriate and enhancing configuration for the entire scene. You must decide on the crystal's shape, the base material, the surrounding environment, and the lighting mood to best complement the vibe of the user's subject.# Creative Analysis Logic (Art Director Instructions):Analyze the Vibe: Is the subject elegant (e.g., ballerina, swan), cozy (e.g., sleeping cat, family photo), powerful (e.g., lion, sports car), or architectural?Determine Crystal Shape:Elegant/Tall Subjects -> Use a tall, multi-faceted prism or diamond shape to enhance verticality.Solid/Cozy Subjects -> Use a hefty, thick rectangular block or cube to convey weight and warmth.Dynamic Subjects -> Use complex geometric shapes with many bevels to refract light dramatically.Determine Environment & Lighting:Elegant Vibe: Place it in a luxurious, dark, moody environment (art gallery, velvet study). Use dramatic, cool ambient light contrasting with warmth from the base.Cozy/Warm Vibe: Place it in a homey, soft environment (wooden desk, near a fireplace). Use warm, soft, golden-hour lighting with cozy bokeh.Modern/Tech Vibe: Place it on a sleek, minimalist surface (polished concrete, dark glass). Use clean, neutral lighting.# Image Generation Template (Mandatory Technical Specs):Whatever artistic choices you make based on the logic above, the final image MUST adhere to these technical specifications to ensure a realistic "3D Laser Engraving" look:Engraving Style: The subject inside must NOT look like a solid 3D print. It MUST be described as a "volumetric white point-cloud engraving," having a "frosty, granular, subsurface texture" made of millions of micro-cracks inside the glass.Lighting Interaction: The engraving must "glow brilliantly from within," illuminated entirely by warm, golden LED light originating from the base beneath it.Material: The crystal must be heavy, clear, flawless K9 optical glass with beveled edges that catch and split the light.Photography Style: Cinematic product photograph, macro lens, extremely shallow depth of field (bokeh), 8k resolution, hyper-detailed.# Input Process:I will now provide the subject. You will instantly apply the creative logic and generate the final image.
